records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Hasan Ibn Ali Ibn Abi Hamzah
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Abi Hamzah, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from his uncle Muhammad ibn Abi Al-Qasim, from Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Ṣayrafi, from Ismaʿil ibn Mihran, from Al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Abi Hamzah Al-Baṭaʾini.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن الحسن بن عليّ بن أبي حمزة فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عمّه محمّد بن أبي القاسم، عن محمّد بن عليّ الصيرفيّ، عن إسماعيل بن مهران، عن الحسن بن عليّ بن أبي حمزة البطائنيّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-faḍl Ibn Abi Qurrah Al-Samandi Al-Kufi
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Al-Faḍl ibn Abi Qurrah Al-Samandi Al-Kufi, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Al-Husayn Al-Saʿdaʾbadi, from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdillah Al-Barqi, from Sharif ibn Sabiq Al-Tiflisi, from Al-Faḍl ibn Abi Qurrah Al-Samandi Al-Kufi.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن الفضل بن أبي قرّة السمنديّ الكوفيّ فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن الحسين السعدآباديّ، عن أحمد بن‌ أبي عبد اللّه البرقيّ، عن شريف بن سابق التفليسيّ، عن الفضل بن أبي قرّة السّمنديّ الكوفيّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abd Al-Hamid Ibn awaḍ Al-ṭaʾi
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Abd Al-Hamid ibn Awaḍ Al-Ṭaʾi, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Yahya Al-Aṭṭar, from Muhammad ibn Ahmad, from ʿImran ibn Musa, from Al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Al-Nuʿman, from his father, from Abd Al-Hamid ibn Awaḍ Al-Ṭaʾi.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن عبد الحميد بن عوّاض الطائيّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن يحيى العطّار، عن محمّد بن أحمد، عن عمران بن موسى، عن الحسن بن عليّ بن النعمان، عن أبيه، عن عبد الحميد بن عوّاض الطّائيّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abd Al-ṣamad Ibn Bashir
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Abd Al-Ṣamad ibn Bashir, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Al-Hasan ibn Matil Al-Daqqaq, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Khaṭṭab, from Jafar ibn Bashir, from Abd Al-Ṣamad ibn Bashir Al-Kufi.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن عبد الصمد بن بشير فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن الحسن بن متّيل الدّقّاق، عن محمّد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطّاب، عن جعفر ابن بشير، عن عبد الصمد بن بشير الكوفيّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abdullah Ibn Muhammad Al-juʿfi
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Abdullah ibn Muhammad Al-Juʿfi, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Khaṭṭab, from Jafar ibn Bashir, from Abdullah ibn Muhammad Al-Juʿfi.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن عبد اللّه بن محمّد الجعفيّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطّاب، عن جعفر بن بشير، عن عبد اللّه بن محمّد الجعفيّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Mithami
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Al-Mithami, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Ṣaffar, from Yaʿqub ibn Yazid, from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan ibn Ziyad, from Ahmad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Mithami.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن الميثميّ فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار، عن يعقوب بن يزيد، عن محمّد بن الحسن بن زياد، عن أحمد ابن الحسن الميثميّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abu Thamamah
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Abu Thamamah, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh, and Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil, and Al-Husayn ibn Ibrahim - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from his father, from Abu Thamamah, the companion of Abu Jafar Al-Thani, peace be upon him.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن أبي ثمامة فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه؛ و محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل؛ و الحسين بن إبراهيم- رضي اللّه عنهم- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم بن‌ هاشم، عن أبيه، عن أبي ثمامة صاحب أبي جعفر الثّاني عليه السّلام‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to ismaʿil Ibn Abi Fudayk
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Ismaʿil ibn Abi Fudayk, I have narrated it from Al-Husayn ibn Ahmad ibn Idris - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from his father, from Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Al-Mufaḍḍal ibn Umar, from Ismaʿil ibn Abi Fudayk.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن إسماعيل بن أبي فديك فقد رويته عن الحسين بن أحمد بن إدريس- رضي اللّه عنه- عن أبيه، عن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن المفضّل ابن عمر، عن إسماعيل بن أبي فديك‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-ṣabah Ibn Siyabah
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Al-Ṣabah ibn Siyabah, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Ṣaffar, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Khaṭṭab, from Jafar ibn Bashir Al-Bajali, from Hammad ibn Uthman, from Al-Ṣabah ibn Siyabah, the brother of Abd Al-Rahman ibn Siyabah Al-Kufi.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن الصباح بن سيابة فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار، عن محمّد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطّاب، عن جعفر بن بشير البجليّ، عن حمّاد بن عثمان، عن الصباح بن سيابة أخي عبد الرّحمن بن سيابة الكوفيّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ibrahim Ibn Hashim
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Ibrahim ibn Hashim, I have narrated it from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah and Abdullah ibn Jafar Al-Himyari together, from Ibrahim ibn Hashim. And I have also narrated it from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father Ibrahim ibn Hashim.
records.arabicText:
و ما كان فيه عن إبراهيم بن هاشم فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه؛ و عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ جميعا عن إبراهيم بن هاشم.
و رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه إبراهيم بن هاشم‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ruh Ibn Abd Al-Rahim
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Ruh ibn Abd Al-Rahim, I have narrated it from Jafar ibn Ali ibn Al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Abdullah ibn Al-Mughirah Al-Kufi, from his grandfather Al-Hasan ibn Ali Al-Kufi, from Al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Faḍḍal, from Ghalib ibn Uthman, from Ruh ibn Abd Al-Rahim.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن روح بن عبد الرّحيم فقد رويته عن جعفر بن عليّ بن الحسن ابن علي بن عبد اللّه بن المغيرة الكوفيّ، عن جدّه الحسن بن عليّ الكوفيّ، عن الحسن ابن عليّ بن فضّال، عن غالب بن عثمان، عن روح بن عبد الرّحيم‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abdullah Ibn Hammad Al-anṣari
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Abdullah ibn Hammad Al-Anṣari, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Al-Husayn Al-Saʿdaʾbadi, from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdillah Al-Barqi, from his father, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Abdullah ibn Hammad Al-Anṣari.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن عبد اللّه بن حمّاد الأنصاريّ فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن الحسين السعدآباديّ، عن أحمد بن أبي عبد اللّه‌ البرقيّ، عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن عبد اللّه بن حمّاد الأنصاريّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to saʿid Ibn Yasar
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Saʿid ibn Yasar, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Ṣaffar, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ʿIsa, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Abi Naṣr Al-Bazanti, from Al-Mufaḍḍal, from Saʿid ibn Yasar Al-Ajli Al-Aʿraj Al-Hannaṭ Al-Kufi.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن سعيد بن يسار فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن أبي نصر البزنطيّ، عن المفضّل، عن سعيد بن يسار العجليّ الأعرج الحنّاط الكوفيّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Bishar Ibn Yasar
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Bishar ibn Yasar, I have narrated it from Al-Husayn ibn Ahmad ibn Idris - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from his father, from Muhammad ibn Abi Al-Ṣuhban, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Bishar ibn Yasar.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن بشّار بن يسار فقد رويته عن الحسين بن أحمد بن إدريس،- رضي اللّه عنه- عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن أبي الصهبان، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن بشّار بن يسار.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Amr Ibn Abi Al-Miqdam
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Muhammad ibn Amr ibn Abi Al-Miqdam, I have narrated it from Ahmad ibn Ziyad ibn Jafar Al-Hamadani - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Muhammad ibn Amr ibn Abi Al-Miqdam.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن محمّد بن عمرو بن أبي المقدام فقد رويته، عن أحمد بن زياد بن جعفر الهمدانيّ- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن محمّد بن عمرو بن أبي المقدام‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abd Al-Malik Ibn Amr
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Abd Al-Malik ibn Amr, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Khaṭṭab, from Al-Hakam ibn Miskin, from Abd Al-Malik ibn Amr Al-Ahwal Al-Kufi, and he was an Arab.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن عبد الملك بن عمرو فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطّاب، عن الحكم بن مسكين، عن عبد الملك بن عمرو الأحول الكوفيّ و هو عربيّ‌.
records.thaqalaynMatn: from Abd Al-Malik ibn Amr, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Khaṭṭab, from Al-Hakam ibn Miskin, from Abd Al-Malik ibn Amr Al-Ahwal Al-Kufi, and he was an Arab.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Yusuf Ibn yaʿqub
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Yusuf ibn Yaʿqub, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn ʿIsa ibn Ubayd, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Yusuf ibn Yaʿqub, the brother of Yunus ibn Yaʿqub, and they were both Faṭhis.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن يوسف بن يعقوب فقد رويته عن أبي- رحمه اللّه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن عيسى بن عبيد، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن يوسف بن يعقوب أخي يونس بن يعقوب و كانا فطحيّين‌.
records.thaqalaynSanad: And whatever is narrated from Yusuf ibn Yaʿqub, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn ʿIsa ibn Ubayd, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Yusuf ibn Yaʿqub,
records.thaqalaynMatn: the brother of Yunus ibn Yaʿqub, and they were both Faṭhis.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Ali Ibn Mahbub
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Muhammad ibn Ali ibn Mahbub, I have narrated it from my father, and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan, and from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil, and from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Yahya Al-Aṭṭar, and from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Muhammad ibn Yahya Al-Aṭṭar, from Muhammad ibn Ali ibn Mahbub. And I have also narrated it from my father and from Al-Husayn ibn Ahmad ibn Idris - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Ahmad ibn Idris, from Muhammad ibn Ali ibn Mahbub.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن محمّد بن عليّ بن محبوب فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن؛ و محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل؛ و أحمد بن محمّد بن يحيى العطّار؛ و محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنهم- عن محمّد بن يحيى العطّار، عن محمّد بن عليّ بن محبوب. و رويته عن أبي؛ و الحسين بن أحمد بن إدريس- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن أحمد بن إدريس، عن محمّد بن عليّ بن محبوب‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Sinan
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Muhammad ibn Sinan, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from his uncle Muhammad ibn Abi Al-Qasim, from Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Kufi, from Muhammad ibn Sinan. And I have also narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Muhammad ibn Sinan.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن محمّد بن سنان فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عمّه محمّد بن أبي القاسم، عن محمّد بن عليّ الكوفيّ، عن محمّد بن سنان. و رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن سنان‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Al-Walid Al-Kirmani
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Muhammad ibn Al-Walid Al-Kirmani, I have narrated it from Ahmad ibn Ziyad ibn Jafar Al-Hamadani - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from Muhammad ibn Al-Walid Al-Kirmani.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن محمّد بن الوليد الكرمانيّ فقد رويته عن أحمد بن زياد بن جعفر الهمدانيّ- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن محمّد بن الوليد الكرمانيّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn manṣur
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Muhammad ibn Manṣur, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Yahya Al-Aṭṭar, from Muhammad ibn Abi Al-Ṣuhban, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Muhammad ibn Manṣur.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن محمّد بن منصور فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن يحيى العطّار، عن محمّد بن أبي الصهبان، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن محمّد بن منصور.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abdullah Ibn Al-Qasim
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Abdullah ibn Al-Qasim, I have narrated it from Al-Husayn ibn Ahmad ibn Idris - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from his father, from Muhammad ibn Ahmad ibn Yahya, who said: Abu Abdullah Al-Razi narrated to us from Abdullah ibn Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khushnam Al-Aṣbahani, from Abdullah ibn Al-Qasim.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن عبد اللّه بن القاسم فقد رويته عن الحسين بن أحمد بن إدريس- رضي اللّه عنه- عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن أحمد بن يحيى قال: حدّثنا أبو عبد اللّه الرّازيّ عن عبد اللّه بن أحمد بن محمّد بن خشنام الأصبهانيّ، عن عبد اللّه القاسم‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abdullah Ibn Jablah
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Abdullah ibn Jablah, I have narrated it from my father, and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan, and from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Abdullah ibn Jafar Al-Himyari, from Muhammad ibn Abd Al-Jabbar, from Abdullah ibn Jablah.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن عبد اللّه بن جبلة فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن؛ و محمّد بن‌ موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنهم- عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ، عن محمّد بن عبد الجبّار، عن عبد اللّه بن جبلة.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Abdullah Ibn Mihran
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Muhammad ibn Abdullah ibn Mihran, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Al-Husayn Al-Saʿdaʾbadi, from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdillah Al-Barqi, from Muhammad ibn Abdullah ibn Mihran.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن محمّد بن عبد اللّه بن مهران فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن الحسين السعدآباديّ، عن أحمد بن أبي عبد اللّه البرقيّ، عن محمّد بن عبد اللّه بن مهران‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Al-fiḍ
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Muhammad ibn Al-Fiḍ, I have narrated it from Jafar ibn Muhammad ibn Masrur - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad ibn Amir, from his uncle Abdullah ibn Amir, from Ibn Abi Umayr, from Muhammad ibn Al-Fiḍ.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن محمّد بن الفيض فقد رويته عن جعفر بن محمّد بن مسرور- رضي اللّه عنه- عن الحسين بن محمّد بن عامر، عن عمّه عبد اللّه بن عامر، عن ابن أبي عمير، عن محمّد بن الفيض‌.
